title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
